# Pixora Studios

Pixora Studios is a premier web design, development, and software agency based in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. We build high-performance, SEO-optimized custom web assets and digital solutions for local business verticals including clinics, restaurants, cafes, gyms, salons, hotels, and schools.

## Core Structure: Services vs Products

We differentiate bespoke/custom workflows (Services) from repeatable fixed solutions (Products):

### 1. Custom Services (Quote-Based)
Tailor-made projects priced dynamically based on scoped parameters and delivery tracks.
- **Website Design & Development**: High-converting responsive builds. Clinics track starts from ₹5,999; Restaurants track starts from ₹15,000.
- **Appointment Booking Systems**: Frictionless reservation and appointment workflows with real-time calendars.
- **Brand Identity & UI/UX Design**: Elegant logos, styled assets, typography guidelines.
- **SEO & Google Ranking**: Technical optimization, target local mapping, schema markup.
- **Hosting & Maintenance Support**: Fully managed Cloud VPS setup, speed tune-ups, uptime checks.
- **Payment Gateway & POS Integration**: Seamless checkouts synced directly with registers (e.g. Petpooja POS).

### 2. Standalone Products (Tiered Plans)
Repeatable SaaS platforms sold under structured subscription packages.
- **Digital QR Menu**: Contactless dining experience. Includes View Only, View + Update (Bundled at ₹999), Standalone (₹1,499), Order + Payment checkout, and POS synchronization. Also ideal for hotel rooms, lounges, movie halls, gyms, and salons.
- **Gym Management Software**: Subscriptions, member logs, attendance tracking (Coming Soon).
- **School & Coaching Software**: Fee schedules, program registrations, student rosters (Coming Soon).

## Featured Industry Verticals

We build industry-specific SEO-optimized local landing assets:
- **Restaurants & Hospitality** (table bookings, contactless checkouts)
- **Dental & General Clinics** (doctor calendars, trust reviews)
- **Gyms & Fitness Clubs** (class scheduling, tier options)
- **Salons & Spas** (stylist booking, portfolios)
- **Hotels & PGs** (room registration, checklists)
- **Schools & Coaching Centers** (enrollment lists, curriculums)
- **Real Estate & Property** (lead flows, map markers)

## Featured Portfolio Projects

- **Bangalore Express**: Restaurant/Cafe website near KIIT, Bhubaneswar built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS featuring dynamic menu, booking form, and AEO. Live at `https://bangalore-express.pixorastudios.com`
- **SOVEREIGN**: Premium nightlife brand and lounge website in Patia, Bhubaneswar featuring elegant dark-aesthetic multi-page architecture. Live at `https://sovereign.pixorastudios.com`
